title: juncus bufonius subsp. mutabilis
intro: Juncus bufonius subsp. mutabilis, commonly known as Marsh Shield Fern, is a plant species that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and diuretic effects, helping to relieve respiratory and urinary issues. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, including immune system support and protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Juncus bufonius subsp. mutabilis is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential.
